method_description: Representative commercial building-service bundle with current electricity, gas and liquid-fuel shares from official energy data.
evidence_summary: Baseline fuel shares are anchored to official Australian energy statistics; electrification direction is informed by AEMO and method electrification evidence.
derivation_method: Hybrid. 2025 incumbent coefficients are matched to official sector fuel shares. Prospective methods apply electrification and efficiency reductions consistent with Australian electrification studies, smoothed across milestone years.
review_notes: Baseline coefficients reproduce official commercial final-energy fuel shares in 2023–24 when service demand equals 314.2 PJ_service_eq.

method_description: Commercial service bundle with higher-efficiency equipment, reduced fossil fuel use and a predominantly electric load.
evidence_summary: Baseline fuel shares are anchored to official Australian energy statistics; electrification direction is informed by AEMO and method electrification evidence.
derivation_method: Hybrid. 2025 incumbent coefficients are matched to official sector fuel shares. Prospective methods apply electrification and efficiency reductions consistent with Australian electrification studies, smoothed across milestone years.
review_notes: Captures a pragmatic commercial electrification pathway without requiring full end-use disaggregation in Phase 1.

method_label: Deep electrification and efficiency commercial services
method_description: Highly electrified commercial building-service bundle with very low direct fossil use and lower final-energy intensity.
evidence_summary: Baseline fuel shares are anchored to official Australian energy statistics; electrification direction is informed by AEMO and method electrification evidence.
derivation_method: Hybrid. 2025 incumbent coefficients are matched to official sector fuel shares. Prospective methods apply electrification and efficiency reductions consistent with Australian electrification studies, smoothed across milestone years.
review_notes: The most aggressive near-zero-direct-emissions commercial service method in Phase 1.
